creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 180523
Proposed patch (since 430947 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 20161129 to 20170304 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20161129...20170304

The saved games from previous version are not compatible.

The build was tested for FreeBSD 10.3 amd64 (native and with using poudriere).
